channel.title: Session Manager on The Hidden Port
channel.description: Recent content in Session Manager on The Hidden Port

item.title: AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore: Full Policy Breakdown
item.description: What AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore actually permits, when to use it for Session Manager, and how to build a scoped-down custom policy for production.

item.title: Replace SSH with Session Manager: Secure EC2 Access Guide
item.description: Stop using SSH keys and bastion hosts. Set up AWS Systems Manager Session Manager for secure, auditable EC2 access with no inbound ports.
